details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and correct. All rubric requirements are met: (1) top_a parameter added to SamplingParams as float with default 0.0 and validation for [0.0, 1.0] range; (2) filtering logic correctly implemented in both main sampler (_apply_top_a) and V1 sampler (apply_top_a) - computes max probability, masks tokens below threshold, returns logits for renormalization; (3) top_a is properly threaded through all intermediate structures (SamplingParams → SamplingTensors → Sampler, and equivalent V1 paths); (4) comprehensive documentation in docstrings; (5) syntactically valid Python following vLLM conventions. The implementation handles edge cases well (greedy sampling, tensor broadcasting, both GPU and TPU paths, FlashInfer fallback).
